description:
envrc is installed as a private package but Doom has a built-in `direnv`
tools module (currently commented out). Use the Doom module instead for
better integration and maintenance. Or keep envrc but uncomment the
module for proper integration.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (lines ~108, ~1434-1442)
title: Replace envrc with Doom direnv module
